heroSubtitle: Browse our upcoming AI training sessions and register today. All virtual courses are delivered live via Zoom with hands-on activities and Q&A.

courses.title: AI Essentials for Healthcare
courses.description: A foundational course covering AI concepts, responsible use, and practical applications for healthcare professionals at every level.
courses.audience: All healthcare staff — clinical and non-clinical

courses.title: AB-730: Empower Your Workforce with Microsoft 365 Copilot
courses.description: Official Microsoft course on adopting Copilot across your organization. Learn prompting, integration with M365 apps, and responsible AI use.
courses.audience: End users and team leads using Microsoft 365

courses.title: AB-900: Microsoft 365 Copilot Administration
courses.description: Deep-dive for M365 admins covering Copilot deployment, security, governance, and management across your tenant.

courses.title: Ambient AI for Clinicians: Nuance DAX
courses.description: Hands-on training for clinicians adopting Nuance DAX ambient documentation. Covers workflow integration, best practices, and optimization tips.
courses.audience: Physicians and clinical staff using or onboarding DAX

emptyMessage: No courses are currently scheduled. Check back soon or contact us to arrange private training for your organization.
ctaSubtitle: We offer private workshops and custom training programs tailored to your organization. Let's talk about what your team needs.
